item.title: APT29 Targets Energy Sector with New Backdoor
item.description:
APT29 (also known as Cozy Bear) has been observed targeting energy sector organizations with a new backdoor variant. The campaign uses spearphishing emails to deliver malicious documents that execute PowerShell commands.
Indicators of Compromise: C2 IP: 185.220.101.47 Domain: malicious-update[.]com SHA256: a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2c3d4e5f6a1b2 T1566.001 T1059.001 T1071.001

item.title: LockBit 3.0 Infrastructure Update
item.description: New LockBit 3.0 infrastructure has been identified. Ransomware group continues operations with updated TTPs including credential dumping and lateral movement. New C2 domain: lockbit-cdn[.]net IP: 91.92.251.103
